item.title: Pan American Luggage Labels 摘要
item.description:
The article features graphic designer Ella Freire's art pieces that recreate vintage Pan Am luggage tags, described as 'achingly gorgeous' with praise for their colors, typography, and shapes. It is shared via Dan Cederholm's Studio Notes and linked from Daringfireball.net, presenting it as a fun weekend design inspiration.
标签: graphic design, art, vintage, luggage tags, Pan Am, Ella Freire, typography, color, design inspiration, weekend fun

item.title: SQLite Query Result Formatter Demo 摘要
item.description:
Simon Willison has created a demo tool called SQLite Query Result Formatter Demo, which provides a user interface for experimenting with different rendering options for SQL result tables. This tool utilizes the new Query Result Formatter library compiled to WebAssembly. It is related to his notes on SQLite 3.53.0, and the article is tagged with 'tools' and 'sqlite'.
标签: tools, sqlite, database, webassembly, demo, query, formatter, ui, playground, library

item.title: SQLite 3.53.0 摘要
item.description:
SQLite 3.53.0 is a major release following the withdrawal of version 3.52.0, featuring significant user-facing and internal improvements. Key updates include the ability for ALTER TABLE to add and remove NOT NULL and CHECK constraints, the addition of new json_array_insert() and jsonb functions, and substantial CLI mode enhancements with improved result formatting via the new Query Results Formatter library. A WebAssembly-based playground interface has been created to experiment with the formatter.
标签: sqlite, database, sql, release, cli, json, constraints, webassembly, tools, development
